workflow.name: Handle Vietnamese SME customer care on Zalo Bot with Gemini and Google Sheets
workflow.description:
# AI customer care chatbot for Vietnamese SMEs with Zalo Bot, Gemini and Google Sheets CRM

A production ready Zalo Bot chatbot that handles the full customer journey for Vietnamese small and medium businesses: greeting new customers with a sticker, listening for their first reply, routing the message to the right handler, generating AI fallback answers in Vietnamese, escalating to a human agent when needed, and logging every conversation to Google Sheets as a lightweight CRM.

This template uses **every operation** of the `n8n-nodes-zalo-platform` community node (`zaloBotTrigger`, `sendMessage`, `sendPhoto`, `sendSticker`, `getUpdates`) combined with Google Gemini and Google Sheets to deliver a real conversational flow, not a one shot reply.

## Who is this for

Vietnamese SMEs, e-commerce shops, restaurants, clinics, real estate brokers, training centers, and any business already using Zalo Bot Platform that wants to:

- Reply 24/7 in natural Vietnamese without hiring more staff
- Track every customer in a free Google Sheets CRM
- Showcase products and pricing on demand
- Escalate complex requests to a human agent
- Use AI to handle long tail questions

## How it works

1. **Receive Zalo Message** triggers on every text message sent to your bot.
2. **Set Configuration** holds your business name, hotline, product photo URL, pricing, sheet ID, and admin Zalo ID (plug and play).
3. **Extract Customer Info** parses the Zalo payload (`message.from.id`, `message.chat.id`, `message.from.display_name`, `message.text`, `message.message_id`) into clean fields.
4. **Lookup Customer in CRM** reads the Google Sheets `Customers` tab and filters by `senderId` to detect new vs returning customers.
5. **Is New Customer?** branches the flow:
   - **New customer:** append a row to `Customers`, send a welcome sticker (`sendSticker`), send a Vietnamese welcome message (`sendMessage`), then **Listen Welcome Reply** uses `getUpdates` to wait for the user's first response.
   - **Returning customer:** route directly to intent detection.
6. **Normalize After Listen** and **Normalize Returning** unify both paths into a single `messageText` and `messageOriginal` field, so downstream nodes work regardless of source.
7. **Detect Intent** is a Switch node with 4 keyword rules plus an AI fallback. Each rule matches both Vietnamese with diacritics and unaccented variants:
   - `menu` (menu, dịch vụ)
   - `products` (sản phẩm, demo, giải pháp)
   - `pricing` (giá, báo giá, chi phí)
   - `human` (người thật, tư vấn, liên hệ, hỗ trợ)
   - **default** routes to Gemini AI reply
8. **Send Menu**, **Send Product Photo**, and **Send Pricing** handle the matched intents using `sendMessage` and `sendPhoto`.
9. **Log Escalation** writes a row to `Conversations` and **Acknowledge Escalation** confirms receipt to the customer.
10. **Gemini AI Reply** generates a friendly Vietnamese reply using Google Gemini 2.0 Flash with full business context.
11. **Send AI Reply** delivers the response back via Zalo Bot.
12. **Log Conversation** appends every message and reply to the `Conversations` sheet so you can review chats and improve the bot.

## What makes this template different

- **Full conversational flow**, not just a one shot auto reply
- **Two path normalization**: the welcome reply path and the returning customer path converge into a single intent router
- **Vietnamese first**: keyword matching, AI prompts, and replies all handle Vietnamese with diacritics natively
- **Free CRM**: ready to copy Google Sheets template included, no database setup required
- **Uses every operation** of the Zalo Bot community node
- **Production patterns**: customer state tracking, conversation logging, human escalation, and AI fallback, all in one workflow

## Requirements

- Self hosted n8n (community nodes are not available on n8n Cloud)
- Community node: `n8n-nodes-zalo-platform`
- A Zalo Bot created via **Zalo Bot Manager** inside the Zalo app (gives you a Bot Token in the format `bot_id:secret_key`). This is **not** Zalo Official Account.
- Google account with access to Google Sheets and Google Gemini (free tier from Google AI Studio)

## How to set up

1. Install the community node via **Settings > Community Nodes**: `n8n-nodes-zalo-platform`
2. Create credentials for Zalo Bot, Google Sheets OAuth2, and Google Gemini
3. **Get the Google Sheets CRM template** (ready to copy):
   - Open: [Google Sheets CRM template](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1e9155FKWikWTADXWssAdYvOq7g8l3N4NvhnxQXo9EFc/edit?usp=sharing)
   - **File > Make a copy**
   - The template already contains both tabs:
     - `Customers`: `senderId | name | firstSeen | lastSeen | messageCount`
     - `Conversations`: `timestamp | senderId | name | messageId | message | intent | reply`
4. Copy your new Sheet ID from the URL (between `/d/` and `/edit`) and paste it into the **Set Configuration** node `googleSheetId` field
5. Edit **Set Configuration** with your business name, hotline, product photo URL, and pricing text
6. Activate the workflow. The webhook is auto registered with Zalo Bot Platform.
7. Send a message to your bot to test. Try keywords: `menu`, `sản phẩm`, `giá`, `người thật`, or any free form question.

## How to customize

- Add more intents to the Switch node (booking, refund, shipping, address lookup)
- Replace Google Sheets with Airtable, Notion, Postgres, or Supabase for a real database
- Send order confirmations with `sendPhoto` (QR code, invoice image)
- Send promotional stickers on Tet, Black Friday, or seasonal events
- Add a Schedule Trigger to broadcast daily promotions to all customers in the CRM
- Plug in your website knowledge base via Retrieval Augmented Generation
- Switch Gemini for OpenAI, Claude, or a self hosted local model
- Add an Hours Of Operation check to send a different reply outside business hours

## Need help

- [Zalo Bot node setup guide](https://thenexova.com/n8n-zalo-bot-node-complete-setup-and-operations-guide/)
- Email: `contact@thenexova.com`
- Built by **THE NEXOVA**, automation and AI partner for Vietnamese businesses

workflow.name: AI customer care chatbot for Vietnamese SMEs with Zalo Bot, Gemini and Google Sheets CRM

parameters.content:
## AI customer care chatbot for Vietnamese SMEs with Zalo Bot, Gemini and Google Sheets CRM

### How it works
1. The Zalo Bot Trigger receives every text message sent to your bot.
2. The customer is looked up in Google Sheets CRM; new customers get a welcome sticker and greeting.
3. A Switch node detects intent by keyword: menu, products, pricing, or human escalation.
4. Known intents trigger specific handlers (text menu, product photo, pricing list, or escalation log).
5. Unrecognized messages go to Google Gemini for a context-aware Vietnamese AI reply.
6. Every conversation is logged to Google Sheets for review and training.

### Setup steps
- [ ] Self-hosted n8n required (community nodes cannot be installed on n8n Cloud)
- [ ] Install community node `n8n-nodes-zalo-platform` via **Settings > Community Nodes**
- [ ] Create a Zalo Bot via **Zalo Bot Manager** in the Zalo app to get the Bot Token
- [ ] Create a Google Gemini credential (free tier from [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com))
- [ ] Copy the [Google Sheets CRM template](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1e9155FKWikWTADXWssAdYvOq7g8l3N4NvhnxQXo9EFc/edit?usp=sharing) via **File > Make a copy**
- [ ] Create a Google Sheets credential and assign it to all Sheets nodes
- [ ] Paste your Sheet ID into the **Set Configuration** node `googleSheetId` field
- [ ] Update **Set Configuration** with your business name, product photo URL, pricing, and hotline
- [ ] Activate the workflow

### Customization
- Add more intents to the Switch node (booking, refund, shipping)
- Replace Google Sheets with Airtable, Notion, or Postgres
- Send promotional stickers on seasonal events
- Add business-hours check for different out-of-office replies
- Switch Gemini for OpenAI, Claude, or a self-hosted model

### Need help?
- [Zalo Bot node setup guide](https://thenexova.com/n8n-zalo-bot-node-complete-setup-and-operations-guide/)

## Receive and configure

The Zalo Bot Trigger listens for incoming text messages. The Set Configuration node holds your business name, product photo, pricing, hotline, and Google Sheet ID.

## Identify customer

Extracts sender ID, name, and message text from the Zalo payload, then looks up the customer in the Google Sheets CRM by sender ID.

## Welcome new customers

If the sender is not in the CRM yet: append a new row, send a welcome sticker, then greet with the menu options. Returning customers skip directly to intent detection.

## Detect intent by keyword

The Switch node routes messages by Vietnamese keywords: `menu`, `san pham`, `gia`, `nguoi that`. Anything else falls through to the AI reply.

## Handle known intents

Each intent demonstrates a different Zalo Bot operation: `sendMessage` for menu and pricing, `sendPhoto` for product showcase, and escalation logging with acknowledgment.

## AI fallback with Gemini

For unrecognized messages, Google Gemini 2.0 Flash generates a friendly Vietnamese reply using your business context. Gemini has excellent Vietnamese support and a generous free tier.

## Reply and log conversation

The AI reply is sent back via Zalo Bot, then the full exchange is appended to the Conversations tab in Google Sheets with timestamp, intent, and reply text for later review.

## Google Sheets CRM template

**Template URL:** https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1e9155FKWikWTADXWssAdYvOq7g8l3N4NvhnxQXo9EFc/edit?usp=sharing

### Setup
- [ ] Open the link above and **File > Make a copy**
- [ ] Copy the Sheet ID from the URL (between `/d/` and `/edit`)
- [ ] Paste it into the **Set Configuration** node `googleSheetId` field
- [ ] Create a Google Sheets credential and assign it to all 4 Sheets nodes

### Tabs and columns (already in the template)

**Customers** tab: `senderId | name | firstSeen | lastSeen | messageCount`

**Conversations** tab: `timestamp | senderId | name | messageId | message | intent | reply`

The `intent` column will be either `ai_reply` or `human_escalation` for easy filtering.

### Community Node - Self-hosted only
This template uses the `n8n-nodes-zalo-platform` community node which requires self-hosted n8n. It cannot be installed on n8n Cloud. The Zalo Bot is created via **Zalo Bot Manager** inside the Zalo app.

assignments.value:
BAO GIA THAM KHAO THE NEXOVA

Goi Khoi Dau
Tu van n8n va setup co ban, phu hop shop nho va freelancer.

Goi Tang Truong
AI Chatbot tieng Viet, CRM tu dong, workflow da kenh, phu hop SME 10 den 50 nhan vien.

Goi Doanh Nghiep
Tich hop ERP/CRM, custom n8n node, SLA va ho tro uu tien, phu hop doanh nghiep lon.

Bao gia chi tiet tuy quy mo va nghiep vu. Vui long:
https://thenexova.com/contact
user@example.com
Hoac go 'nguoi that' de duoc tu van ngay

parameters.text:
=Xin chao {{ $('Extract Customer Info').item.json.senderName }}!

Cam on ban da lien he THE NEXOVA, doi tac tu dong hoa va AI cho doanh nghiep Viet.

Ban co the chon:
- Go 'menu' de xem dich vu chinh
- Go 'san pham' de xem giai phap tieu bieu
- Go 'gia' de xem bao gia tham khao
- Go 'nguoi that' de gap tu van vien

Hoac cu hoi tu nhien, tro ly AI cua THE NEXOVA se tra loi ngay bang tieng Viet!

https://thenexova.com

=DICH VU THE NEXOVA

THE NEXOVA giup doanh nghiep Viet tiet kiem 40 den 80% thoi gian van hanh nho tu dong hoa va AI.

Dich vu tieu bieu:
1. Tu van va trien khai n8n
2. AI Chatbot tieng Viet cho Zalo, Messenger, Web
3. Phat trien n8n community node theo yeu cau (Firecrawl, Zalo Bot, OpenRouter...)
4. Tu dong hoa CRM, marketing, thuong mai dien tu
5. Giam sat doi thu va phan tich canh tranh

Tiep theo:
- Go 'san pham' de xem giai phap chi tiet
- Go 'gia' de nhan bao gia tham khao
- Go 'nguoi that' de duoc tu van mien phi

https://thenexova.com/contact

parameters.caption:
=Giai phap AI Chatbot Zalo cua THE NEXOVA

Cham soc khach hang 24/7 bang tieng Viet tu nhien. Tich hop CRM Google Sheets, phat hien y dinh, leo thang sang nhan vien that khi can.

Day cung chinh la chatbot ban dang tro chuyen cung!

Tinh nang chinh:
- Hieu tieng Viet co dau
- Luu lich su khach hang tu dong
- Bao gia, demo san pham, gui sticker
- Mo rong de dang cho Web, Messenger, Telegram

Bao gia: go 'gia'
Tu van: go 'nguoi that'

https://thenexova.com

parameters.text:

Trong luc cho, ban co the tham khao:
Website: https://thenexova.com
Email: contact@thenexova.com

values.content:
=Ban la tro ly cham soc khach hang chuyen nghiep cua THE NEXOVA, doi tac tu dong hoa va AI cho doanh nghiep Viet Nam.

Quy tac tra loi:
1. Bang tieng Viet co dau, than thien, ngan gon (toi da 150 tu)
2. Khi phu hop, goi y dich vu THE NEXOVA: tu van n8n, AI Chatbot tieng Viet, tu dong hoa quy trinh, custom n8n community node
3. Neu khach hoi ve gia, goi y go 'gia'
4. Neu khach muon xem demo san pham, goi y go 'san pham'
5. Neu khong chac cau tra loi, huong dan khach:
   - Website: https://thenexova.com
   - Email: contact@thenexova.com
   - Form lien he: https://thenexova.com/contact
   - Hoac go 'nguoi that' de gap tu van vien

Cau hoi tu khach hang ten {{ $('Extract Customer Info').item.json.senderName }}:
{{ $json.messageOriginal }}

user.bio: We're a Strategic Operations & Implementation Partner - bridging Strategy to Execution for SMEs and foreign investors in Vietnam - from digital operations architecture to process automation. Creator of Firecrawl v2 node and CI automation tools.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
